3259390.name: Goat Massacre
3259390.description:
You took a life, and spent your own rotting in prison for it. Now, dead and standing at heaven's gates, the angels offer you a deal: redeem your soul by destroying Satan's army. Hell is boiling over — demons are pouring through cursed portals onto Earth, and you're heaven's chosen weapon to stop them.

Goat Massacre is a fast-paced first-person roguelike shooter set in a peaceful farmland torn apart by hell itself. As cursed portals rip open the earth and unleash Satan's army, you must slaughter every last demon and collapse their gateways. Each wave hits harder than the last, but every destroyed portal earns you sacred relics from the heavens — divine blessings that stack into godly power.

Arm yourself and stack holy relics to build devastating combinations of strength, speed, and divine abilities. Turn yourself into an unstoppable force and blast those demonic abominations back to the underworld.

Shatter enough portals and a tear in reality opens — your path straight to hell and the Devil himself. Face Satan in a final showdown to earn your place in heaven. But redemption doesn't come easy. Challenge him again and again for virtually infinite gameplay.
3259390.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
